pages:
LendBridge Capital Corp.
Quarterly Credit & Operating Review
Period Ended: Q2 2024
LendBridge Capital Corp. ("LendBridge") is a specialty finance platform providing working capital lines to SMEs across North
America. Revenue is generated through interest income, origination fees, and ancillary treasury services.
Condensed Income Summary
Item Q2 2024
Recognized Revenue $10.1M
Interest Expense ($2.9M)
Net Interest Margin 8.6%
Fee & Other Income $0.7M
Gross Margin 58%
Pre-Provision Operating Margin 29%
Credit Portfolio Indicators
Metric Q2 2024
Total Loan Book (gross) $258M
Active Borrowers 1,180
Average Loan Size $72k
Net Charge-off Rate (LTM) 4.2%
Balance Sheet Leverage 2.8x
Senior Covenant Headroom +140bps
Total Headcount 162
Portfolio Sector Mix - Q2 2024
Sector Outstanding Balance Share of Book
Services $95M 37%
Manufacturing $62M 24%
Retail $48M 19%
Hospitality $34M 13%
Other $19M 7%
Non-Core Items
- Non-cash fair value adjustment on warrant portfolio: +$0.4M

- No material one-time items in the quarter.
(1) Net Charge-off Rate is on a last-twelve-months (LTM) basis; includes write-offs net of recoveries.
(2) Pre-Provision Operating Margin excludes loan loss provisions and non-recurring items.
(3) Gross Margin reflects interest income net of cost of funds only.
(4) Senior covenant headroom measured relative to minimum NIM covenant of 7.5%.
